project.name: WhatsApp SaaS API Platform (VPS Edition)
project.description: Production-ready WhatsApp API SaaS for VPS deployment with local development support. NO AWS REQUIRED!

database.why_redis: Queue management, rate limiting, session cache

file_storage.recommended: MinIO for production, local for development

payment_gateway.midtrans: Optional - can be disabled for testing

local_development_setup.description: Setup untuk develop di laptop/PC lokal

quick_start.step_2: Run: docker-compose up -d (start MySQL, Redis, MinIO)

minio.docker_setup:
docker run -p 9000:9000 -p 9001:9001 \
  -v /path/to/data:/data \
  -e MINIO_ROOT_USER=admin \
  -e MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=password \
  minio/minio server /data --console-address :9001

vps_deployment_guide.description: Deploy ke VPS dari provider manapun (Contabo, DigitalOcean, Vultr, etc)

1_initial_setup: apt install -y git curl wget nano
3_install_mysql: sudo mysql -e "GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON whatsapp_saas.* TO 'saas'@'localhost';"
10_build_project: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

minio_service.content:
[Unit]
Description=MinIO
Documentation=https://docs.min.io
Wants=network-online.target
After=network-online.target

[Service]
User=minio-user
Group=minio-user
Type=notify
WorkingDirectory=/usr/local/
ExecStart=/usr/local/bin/minio server /var/lib/minio --console-address :9001
Restart=always
LimitNOFILE=65536
Environment="MINIO_ROOT_USER=minioadmin"
Environment="MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD=changeme123"

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

backup_strategy_vps.description: Backup tanpa cloud service - semua di VPS atau external storage

script.content:
#!/bin/bash
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
BACKUP_DIR="/home/deploy/backups/mysql"
DB_NAME="whatsapp_saas"
DB_USER="saas"
DB_PASS="your_password"

mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR

# Backup database
mysqldump -u $DB_USER -p$DB_PASS $DB_NAME | gzip > $BACKUP_DIR/backup_$DATE.sql.gz

# Keep only last 30 days
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "backup_*.sql.gz" -mtime +30 -delete

echo "Backup completed: backup_$DATE.sql.gz"

#!/bin/bash
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d_%H%M%S)
BACKUP_DIR="/home/deploy/backups/redis"
REDIS_DIR="/var/lib/redis"

mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR

# Trigger Redis save
redis-cli BGSAVE
sleep 5

# Copy files
cp $REDIS_DIR/dump.rdb $BACKUP_DIR/dump_$DATE.rdb
cp $REDIS_DIR/appendonly.aof $BACKUP_DIR/appendonly_$DATE.aof

# Keep only last 7 days
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "dump_*.rdb" -mtime +7 -delete
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "appendonly_*.aof" -mtime +7 -delete

#!/bin/bash
DATE=$(date +%Y%m%d)
BACKUP_DIR="/home/deploy/backups/storage"
STORAGE_DIR="/home/deploy/whatsapp-saas/storage"

mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR

# Backup storage directory
tar -czf $BACKUP_DIR/storage_$DATE.tar.gz -C $STORAGE_DIR .

# Keep only last 14 days
find $BACKUP_DIR -name "storage_*.tar.gz" -mtime +14 -delete

rclone_example.configure: rclone config # Setup Google Drive or Dropbox
rclone_example.sync_script:
#!/bin/bash
# Sync backups to cloud
rclone sync /home/deploy/backups/ gdrive:whatsapp-backups/ \
  --progress \
  --transfers 4 \
  --log-file=/home/deploy/logs/rclone.log

monitoring_vps.description: Monitoring tanpa cloud service - semua lokal

logrotate_config.content:
/home/deploy/whatsapp-saas/logs/*.log {
  daily
  rotate 14
  compress
  delaycompress
  notifempty
  create 0644 deploy deploy
  sharedscripts
  postrotate
    pm2 reloadLogs
  endscript
}

monitoring_script.content:
#!/bin/bash
API_URL="http://localhost:3000/health"
RESPONSE=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" $API_URL)

if [ $RESPONSE -ne 200 ]; then
  echo "API is down! Status: $RESPONSE"
  # Send notification (email, telegram, etc)
  # Restart PM2 if needed
  pm2 restart whatsapp-api
fi

telegram_notifications.send_message:
curl -s -X POST https://api.telegram.org/bot$BOT_TOKEN/sendMessage \
  -d chat_id=$CHAT_ID \
  -d text="🚨 Alert: API is down!"

vps.recommended: Hetzner or Contabo for best value

database_schema_vps.note: Same as MySQL blueprint from v2.0, optimized for VPS resources

server_hardening: SSH: Disable root login, use key-based auth
Regular updates: apt update && apt upgrade

disk_full.fix: Clean logs, old backups, optimize storage

vps_production.deploy_update: git pull && npm install && npm run build && pm2 restart all

next_steps.1_setup_local: Setup Docker Compose for local development

summary.no_aws: ✅ No AWS S3, No Lambda, No CloudWatch
summary.local_dev: ✅ Full Docker setup for local development
